steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the verb is behavioral economists such as Gee — plural. The phrase whose research focuses on charitable giving is a parenthetical relative clause set off by commas modifying Gee; it doesn't change the subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
A plural subject takes a plural verb. Contend agrees with economists.

Contends and is contending are singular. Has contended is also singular and adds an unwanted perfect-tense aspect.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
